summary: Carbon Credits Module testing completed. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend /carbon dashboard fully functional with 4 tabs (Overview, Projects, Scenarios, Map), all KPI cards displaying correctly, charts rendering, project CRUD working, scenario management with risk sliders working, and Mapbox GL map rendering successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: CarbonScenarioCreate schema includes portfolio_id field but route also takes portfolio_id from URL - minor redundancy but works correctly
seed_data_creation: Existing data: 1 portfolio 'Test Carbon Portfolio' with 1 project 'Solar Farm Alpha' (15,000 tCO2e/yr, RENEWABLE_ENERGY, VCS, US, BBB quality, Medium risk), 6 methodologies seeded (VM0007, VM0015, VM0006, AMS-I.D, AMS-III.D, GS-TPDDTEC), 8 emission factors (US, CN, IN, DE, BR, GB, JP, AU)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carbon module fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /methodologies, GET /emission-factors, GET /portfolios, POST /portfolios, GET /portfolios/{id}, PUT /portfolios/{id}, DELETE /portfolios/{id}, GET /portfolios/{id}/dashboard, GET /projects, POST /projects, GET /projects/{id}, PUT /projects/{id}, DELETE /projects/{id}, GET /portfolios/{id}/scenarios, POST /portfolios/{id}/scenarios, DELETE /portfolios/{id}/scenarios/{id}, POST /calculate, GET /calculations/{id}, POST /reports/generate, GET /reports/{id}/download. Frontend at /carbon has: Portfolio selector, New Portfolio button, Refresh button, Run Calculation button, 4 KPI cards (Total Annual Credits, Risk-Adjusted Credits, Quality Score, 10-Year NPV), 4 tabs (Overview, Projects, Scenarios, Map). Overview tab shows credits chart with 4 projection lines and risk heat map. Projects tab shows project table with Add Project functionality. Scenarios tab shows risk sliders and price/financial parameters. Map tab uses vanilla mapbox-gl (not react-map-gl due to webpack issues) with project markers.
passed_tests: TestCarbonMethodologies::test_methodologies_have_required_fields - id, code, name, standard, sector, status
TestCarbonPortfolios::test_create_portfolio - POST creates portfolio with id, status=active
TestCarbonPortfolios::test_get_portfolios - GET returns list of portfolios
TestCarbonPortfolios::test_get_portfolio_by_id - GET by id returns correct portfolio
TestCarbonProjects::test_create_project - POST creates project with id, status=active, coordinates
TestCarbonProjects::test_get_project_by_id - GET by id returns correct project
TestCarbonPortfolioDashboard::test_get_dashboard_returns_data - returns summary, projects, yearly_projections, risk_heat_map, geographic_distribution

TestCarbonPortfolioDashboard::test_dashboard_summary_fields - total_annual_credits, total_risk_adjusted_credits, portfolio_quality_score/rating, portfolio_npv_10yr_usd, project_count, average_risk_score
TestCarbonScenarios::test_create_scenario - POST creates scenario with risk/price parameters
TestCarbonScenarios::test_scenarios_have_required_fields - all risk and price fields present
TestCarbonCalculations::test_run_standard_calculation - POST /calculate returns total_annual_credits, total_risk_adjusted_credits, portfolio_npv_10yr_usd, risk_breakdown
Carbon page loads at /carbon route after login
4 KPI cards: Total Annual Credits (15.0k tCO2e, +12%), Risk-Adjusted Credits (11.6k tCO2e, +0.3), Quality Score (3.0/5 BBB, +0.3), 10-Year NPV ($1.5M, +8%)
4 tabs present: Overview, Projects, Scenarios, Map
Overview tab: Annual Credits Over Time line chart (Base Case, Optimistic, Pessimistic, Risk Adjusted), Risk Heat Map matrix
Projects tab: All Projects table with PROJECT NAME, TYPE, STANDARD, ANNUAL CREDITS, QUALITY, RISK, ACTIONS columns
Add Project dialog: Project Name, Project Type dropdown, Standard dropdown, Country dropdown, Annual Credits input

Scenarios tab: Base Case (Default) scenario, New Scenario button, Risk Parameters sliders (Permanence 10%, Delivery 5%, Regulatory 5%, Market 10%), Price & Financial (Base Carbon Price $15, Price Growth Rate 5%, Discount Rate 8%), Total Risk Adjustment (30%), Scenario Projections chart
Map tab: Mapbox GL map rendering, Project Locations title, Risk Level legend (Low, Medium, High), Distribution by Country (US: 1 project 15,000 tCO2e)
New Portfolio dialog: Portfolio Name input, Cancel/Create Portfolio buttons
Run Calculation button: triggers calculation and refreshes dashboard
